angle: AI video summarizer that works in seconds.
hook: Want to cut your YouTube watching time in half?
script: Want to cut your YouTube watching time in half? This AI tool summarizes any video in just 10 seconds. Imagine getting the gist of a 30-minute video while you grab your coffee. In our testing, it nailed key points without missing the vibe. Perfect for when you're short on time but still want to stay informed. If you haven't tried this, you’re missing out! Follow for more.
caption_body: You won't believe how fast this works! Have you tried it? 🤯
full_caption: You won't believe how fast this works! Have you tried it? 🤯 #tech #gadgetreview #aitools #youtubesummary #techhacks
